title: Vanillux
description: A lightweight vanilla modpack that combines visuals and utility.
body:
# Vanillux

A lightweight vanilla client-side modpack intended to play on vanilla servers! It includes just enough to satisfy your aesthetic and functional needs, but not too much so as to completely overwhelm you with features and settings.

This modpack was created largely to be distributed among our community, Komimau, to play on our private SMP. If you'd like to join us or have any kind of suggestions or questions, feel free to come by! https://discord.gg/komimau.

![Komimau SMP Spawn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xl2k5Wlx/images/6879df554ec19274863e10b33d00ccde4de4628d.jpeg)

## Features

Some notable features that you might want to know about:
- **Account:** No Chat Reports, Auth Me
- **Visuals:** Sodium, Iris, Dynamic FPS, Free Camera
- **Sound:** AmbientSounds, Presence Footsteps, Sound Physics Remastered, Sounds
- **Functional:** Litematica, Presencium, Simple Voice Chat, Xaero's Minimap/World Map

All included mods can be found on Modrinth (you can see included mods in the Versions tab) with the exception of [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge).

Note: This modpack includes modified game settings (options.txt).
